name: Sauteed Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: 2 thick rib or loin pork chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the pork chops of outer fat, leaving only a 1/4-inch layer. Sprinkle with salt.
2. In a nonstick skillet, heat oil over medium heat. Brown the chops on both sides, then cook uncovered for 20 minutes or until cooked through.
3. Transfer the pork chops to a platter. Pour off all but a tablespoon of fat from the skillet.
4. Add shallots and sauté for a couple of minutes or until soft. Stir in wine and tomato paste, mustard, and broth, then boil down until nicely thickened.
5. Stir in pickles and finish with butter if desired; season with salt and pepper. Pour over the pork chops.
Yield: 2 servings
